justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "next week Tuesday at 14 o'clock" as June 9th, 2026, from 14:00 to 15:00.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in two turns without any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent confirming all details clearly and booking the appointment successfully.
